title: Polar Research Base: Reactor Load Law Discovery
strategies: trivial: emit the constant train-mean of y (matches the grader's baseline predictor -> ~0.1)
greedy: full quadratic-diagonal least squares (captures curvature, misses the cross-product and exponential terms -> mild extrapolation gain)
strong: least-squares fit on the correct poly-exp basis {1, x0^2, x1*x2, exp(0.45*x3), x1}, recovering the functional form so it extrapolates to the held-out storm regime
invalid: emit a non-parsing / disallowed-token expression -> infeasible (0)
